memoryArtifacts.headline: Stained glass in Holy Trinity Church, Long Melford, Suffolk - Left, Elizabeth Tilney. Right: Agnes Tilney, On her kirtle, she displays her paternal arms Tilney/by mantle the 1/4 arms Howard. Below: Latin2Eng: "Elizabeth born Tilney wife of Thomas Howard"

popularStory.headline: History of Elizabeth Tilney (1445-1497]
popularStory.description:
Elizabeth Tilney, Countess of Surrey (before 1445 – 4 April 1497) was an English heiress and lady-in-waiting to two queens. She became the first wife of Thomas Howard, Earl of Surrey.

She served as a …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tilney於大約1444年出生在英國諾福爾可阿申維爾索普時，她的父親Sir Frederick Tilney25歲，母親Elizabeth Cheney23歲。她於大約1466年與Sir Humphrey Bourchier結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年4月4日在英國倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Tilney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tilney (Norfolk), which derives its name from the Old English personal name Tila, Tilla (genitive Tilan, Tillan) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tilney was born about 1444, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Frederick Tilney, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Cheney, was 23. She married Sir Humphrey Bourchier about 1466. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 4 April 1497, in London, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tilney est née environ 1444, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Frederick Tilney, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cheney, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Bourchier environ 1466. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 avril 1497, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England: Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tilney um 1444 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Frederick Tilney 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Cheney 23. Sie hat um 1466 Sir Humphrey Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. April 1497 im Alter von 54 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilneyが約1444年にイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペで生まれた時，父Sir Frederick Tilneyは25歳，母Elizabeth Cheneyは23歳であった。約1466年にSir Humphrey Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年4月4日にイギリスロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilney(이)가 대략 1444년 영국 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Frederick Tilney(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Cheney(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1466년 Sir Humphrey Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 4월 4일 영국 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tilney nasceu aproximadamente 1444, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Frederick Tilney, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cheney, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Bourchier aproximadamente 1466. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de abril de 1497, em London, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tilney родилась около 1444 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Frederick Tilney было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cheney, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Bourchier около 1466 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 апреля 1497 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.
